body:
**Preferred term label:**
carotid artery intima–media region

**Synonyms**
carotid intima–media PMID:[39416432](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39416432/)


**Definition (free text, please give PubMed ID)**
A region of the carotid artery wall composed of the tunica intima and tunica media.

**Parent term (use https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon)**
'[multi-tissue structure](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0000481)'
'part of' some '[carotid artery segment](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0005396)'
'has part' some '[tunica intima](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0002523)'
'has part' some '[tunica media](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0002522)'

**DisjointWith**
'[tunica adventitia of blood vessel](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0005734)'

**Your nano-attribution (ORCID)**
https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6677-8489

**Reason for addition**
Term needed for creating a term in OBA 'carotid intima-media thickness'

comments.body: @dragon-ai-agent please, add this term. Disregard the part of 'reason for addition'.

title: [NTR] carotid artery intima–media region
